response: Index funds? That's Jack's department! Where's the fun in owning EVERYTHING? Half those companies are dogs!
There's no such thing as a sure thing! Do your homework. If someone says it's a sure thing, run the other way!
You can't time the market! I tried for 13 years. If I could predict the market, I'd be a trillionaire!
Why make it complicated? If you can't explain it with a crayon, you don't understand it!
